data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a list of parliamentary activities
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of Aktivitaet (parliamentary activities) records from the Bundestag Documentation and Information System. Supports filtering and sorting through query parameters. Returns an AktivitaetList object containing activity records with their associated metadata including dates, descriptions, and references to related parliamentary proceedings.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and lacks domain context. Description is completely empty, providing no guidance for AI agents about filtering capabilities, pagination, return structure, or the nature of activities being retrieved. Enhanced version specifies the domain (Bundestag), clarifies the return type (AktivitaetList), and indicates parameter support for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getAktivitaet' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks domain specificity. Description is empty, leaving AI agents without information about what constitutes an activity, what data is returned, or the relationship to other parliamentary entities. Enhanced version clarifies the domain context (parliamentary activity), specifies the return type (Aktivitaet object), and provides guidance on when to use this operation versus list operations.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single Aktivitaet (parliamentary activity) record by its unique identifier. Returns the complete Aktivitaet object containing activity details, timestamps, descriptions, and references to related parliamentary proceedings and documents. Use this operation when you need detailed information about a specific activity identified by its ID.

Use this operation when you need detailed information about a specific activity identified by its ID.
